params.name: Hope Diamond
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Club Chest (1.5%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
params.description:
On Aug 16, 1958, the Cursed Stone finally recovered its name of being the Hope Diamond.
The Hope Diamond has always been known as the Cursed Stone, as it used to bring bad luck to anyone who came into contact with it. Vermeer was bitten to death by a wild dog; Louis XIV suffered from smallpox and died; Louis XV's mistress was beheaded; Louis XVI and his wife were killed on a guillotine; later, family of Calan died suddenly. Hopper, the only survivor, died alone in lifelong loneliness. That's why …
